turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hi there ! tell me about yourself

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: just graduated , now teaching kindergarten in ny to 26 angels . you ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: ooh that's super awesome ! just eating some organic kale right now , only organic for me

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i am with you i am a big nature nut , i love kayaking ! do you ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: no , my hobby is collecting autographs i've over 2000 !

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: wow ! i need to get outside , my school is huge . any good autographs ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: some really prolific comic book writers i collect those too

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: do you have a favorite comic ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: spiderman , because i've 2 snakes and venom is kinda snake like

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: that is amazing what kind of snakes are they ? we have one in our class

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i have an anaconda and a python

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: we have a kenyan sand boa . its really cute . that's too cool !

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: that's cool ! i hate all their shedding though i'm allergic to dust
